headline: PhD Candidate at MILA / Polytechnique Montreal
bioMarkdown:
I study continual learning and neural network optimization, with emphasis on catastrophic forgetting and sharpness-aware minimization. I’m advised by [Prof. Sarath Chandar](https://sarathchandar.in).

Representative work: [Manifold Metric](https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.15895) (CoLLAs 2025, Oral), [Lookbehind-SAM](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.16704) (ICML 2024), [Critical Momenta](https://arxiv.org/abs/2307.09638) (TMLR 2024), and [TAG](https://arxiv.org/abs/2105.05155) (CoLLAs 2022).

Before the PhD, I did my MS at [IIT Madras](https://www.iitm.ac.in) with [Prof. Balaraman Ravindran](https://www.cse.iitm.ac.in/~ravi/) and Sarath Chandar at [RBCDSAI](https://rbcdsai.iitm.ac.in).

[Sketching](/en/photos/?g=sketches), [hiking](/en/photos/?g=hiking), reading [non-fiction](https://www.goodreads.com/user/show/49705608-pranshu-malviya), cricket, and [travel](/en/photos/?g=travel) (four of the seven [wonders](/en/photos/?g=wonders) so far) — or browse the [full gallery](/en/photos/).
blogTagline: Book notes, research reflections, and the occasional deep dive.
